title: Create backfill-current-empcode-scan-logs.ts script
description: Create backfill script to populate currentEmpCode columns in existing attendance_scan_logs

files.change: Create backfill script for existing scan log data

implementation: Create TypeScript script with batch processing (TOP 1000 pattern)
Query attendance_scan_logs WHERE current_emp_code IS NULL AND mapping_status='MAPPED'
For each record: lookup by parsed_employee_code to get NIK, then resolve current_emp_code
Update record with resolved_nik, current_emp_code, current_employee_id, current_mapping_status, current_resolved_at
Track statistics: total processed, success count, failed count

criteria: Process existing scan logs and update current_emp_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_scan_logs WHERE current_emp_code IS NOT NULL returns expected count

manual_checks: Run with --dry-run to verify affected rows
success_metrics: > 90% of MAPPED records get current_emp_code populated
Script completes in < 30 minutes for 100,000 records
